title: [GVN] Properly combine AA metadata if available load is hoisted
author: antoniofrighetto
description:
Ensure the AA metadata are properly merged between the new load and the old one during PRE. `combineMetadataForCSE` assumes the new load doesn't move, which is not correct if the new load has happened to be hoisted.

Fixes: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/196787.

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: Antonio Frighetto (antoniofrighetto)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

Ensure the AA metadata are properly merged between the new load and the old one during PRE. `combineMetadataForCSE` assumes the new load doesn't move, which is not correct if the new load has happened to be hoisted.

Fixes: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/196787.

---
Full diff: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/197948.diff


2 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVN.cpp (+1-1) 
- (modified) llvm/test/Transforms/GVN/PRE/pre-load.ll (+73) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVN.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVN.cpp
index c069c1600a79b..17c3520da7b66 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVN.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVN.cpp
@@ -1622,7 +1622,7 @@ void GVNPass::eliminatePartiallyRedundantLoad(
         ++NumPRELoadMoved2CEPred;
         ICF->insertInstructionTo(NewLoad, UnavailableBlock);
         LoadInst *OldLoad = It->second;
-        combineMetadataForCSE(NewLoad, OldLoad, false);
+        combineAAMetadata(NewLoad, OldLoad);
         OldLoad->replaceAllUsesWith(NewLoad);
         replaceValuesPerBlockEntry(ValuesPerBlock, OldLoad, NewLoad);
         if (uint32_t ValNo = VN.lookup(OldLoad, false))
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/GVN/PRE/pre-load.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/GVN/PRE/pre-load.ll
index afa13549db458..d8e1c2b059d8d 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/GVN/PRE/pre-load.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/GVN/PRE/pre-load.ll
@@ -1551,3 +1551,76 @@ if.end:
 }
 
 declare void @opaque(ptr) nounwind willreturn
+
+; Ensure AA metadata are combined properly while hoisting the load.
+
+@g_bool = global i8 0, align 1
+@g_long = global i64 0, align 8
+
+define void @test_combine_metadata(i1 %c, i64 %arg) {
+; MDEP-LABEL: @test_combine_metadata(
+; MDEP-NEXT:  entry:
+; MDEP-NEXT:    [[C3:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
+; MDEP-NEXT:    br label [[LOOP:%.*]]
+; MDEP:       loop:
+; MDEP-NEXT:    [[PHI:%.*]] = phi ptr [ @g_long, [[IF_THEN:%.*]] ], [ [[C3]], [[ENTRY:%.*]] ]
+; MDEP-NEXT:    store i64 [[ARG:%.*]], ptr @g_long, align 8, !tbaa [[TBAA0:![0-9]+]]
+; MDEP-NEXT:    [[TR:%.*]] = trunc i64 [[ARG]] to i8
+; MDEP-NEXT:    store i8 [[TR]], ptr [[C3]], align 1, !tbaa [[TBAA4:![0-9]+]]
+; MDEP-NEXT:    [[V1_PRE:%.*]] = load i8, ptr [[PHI]], align 1, !tbaa [[TBAA6:![0-9]+]]
+; MDEP-NEXT:    br i1 [[C:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
+; MDEP:       if.else:
+; MDEP-NEXT:    store i8 [[V1_PRE]], ptr @g_bool, align 8, !tbaa [[TBAA0]]
+; MDEP-NEXT:    br label [[IF_THEN]]
+; MDEP:       if.then:
+; MDEP-NEXT:    store i8 [[V1_PRE]], ptr @g_bool, align 1
+; MDEP-NEXT:    br label [[LOOP]]
+;
+; MSSA-LABEL: @test_combine_metadata(
+; MSSA-NEXT:  entry:
+; MSSA-NEXT:    [[C3:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
+; MSSA-NEXT:    br label [[LOOP:%.*]]
+; MSSA:       loop:
+; MSSA-NEXT:    [[PHI:%.*]] = phi ptr [ @g_long, [[IF_THEN:%.*]] ], [ [[C3]], [[ENTRY:%.*]] ]
+; MSSA-NEXT:    store i64 [[ARG:%.*]], ptr @g_long, align 8, !tbaa [[TBAA0:![0-9]+]]
+; MSSA-NEXT:    [[TR:%.*]] = trunc i64 [[ARG]] to i8
+; MSSA-NEXT:    store i8 [[TR]], ptr [[C3]], align 1, !tbaa [[TBAA4:![0-9]+]]
+; MSSA-NEXT:    br i1 [[C:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
+; MSSA:       if.else:
+; MSSA-NEXT:    [[V2:%.*]] = load i8, ptr [[PHI]], align 1, !tbaa [[TBAA6:![0-9]+]]
+; MSSA-NEXT:    store i8 [[V2]], ptr @g_bool, align 8, !tbaa [[TBAA0]]
+; MSSA-NEXT:    br label [[IF_THEN]]
+; MSSA:       if.then:
+; MSSA-NEXT:    [[V1:%.*]] = load i8, ptr [[PHI]], align 1, !tbaa [[TBAA4]]
+; MSSA-NEXT:    store i8 [[V1]], ptr @g_bool, align 1
+; MSSA-NEXT:    br label [[LOOP]]
+;
+entry:
+  %val = alloca i8, align 1
+  br label %loop
+
+loop:
+  %phi = phi ptr [ @g_long, %if.then ], [ %val, %entry ]
+  store i64 %arg, ptr @g_long, align 8, !tbaa !3
+  %trunc = trunc i64 %arg to i8
+  store i8 %trunc, ptr %val, align 1, !tbaa !5
+  br i1 %c, label %if.then, label %if.else
+
+if.else:
+  %v2 = load i8, ptr %phi, align 1, !tbaa !7
+  store i8 %v2, ptr @g_bool, align 8, !tbaa !3
+  br label %if.then
+
+if.then:
+  %v1 = load i8, ptr %phi, align 1, !tbaa !5
+  store i8 %v1, ptr @g_bool, align 1
+  br label %loop
+}
+
+!0 = !{!"Simple C/C++ TBAA"}
+!1 = !{!"omnipotent char", !0, i64 0}
+!2 = !{!"long", !1, i64 0}
+!3 = !{!2, !2, i64 0}
+!4 = !{!"_Bool", !1, i64 0}
+!5 = !{!4, !4, i64 0}
+!7 = !{!1, !1, i64 0}

``````````

</details>
